##RRUFFID=R060230

##LOCALITY=near mouth of Akatore Creek, Taieri, Otago Province, New Zealand

##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Orange-brown massive

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Mn^2+^_8.66_Mg_0.12_Fe^2+^_0.09_Fe^3+^_0.09_Ca_0.04_)(Al_1.87_Cr_0.13_)(Si_7.91_Al_0.09_)O_24_(OH)_8_ ; OH estimated by difference and stoichiometry   Fe2 and Fe3 by charge balance
